name: Apple Raisin Crepes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oat Bran hot cereal - uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oat bran and baking powder in a bowl.
2. Add this mixture to the combined milk, egg whites, and margarine, stirring well until smooth.
3. Heat a 6 to 7 inch crepe pan or skillet over medium heat. Lightly coat with non-stick spray or lightly oil before making each crepe.
4. Pour about 1/4 cup batter onto the hot prepared pan. Tilt the pan to coat the bottom evenly.
5. Cook for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, or until the top looks dry. Turn and cook an additional minute.
6. Stack between sheets of wax paper.
7. In a separate bowl, combine the ricotta, apple, raisins, sugar, and vanilla. Mix well.
8. Spoon about 2 tablespoons along less evenly browned side of each crepe.
9. Fold or roll up sides to cover the filling.
10. Combine syrup and cinnamon in a small saucepan. Heat over medium heat for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
11. Just before serving, pour 2 tablespoons over each crepe. Makes 5 servings -- 10 crepes (about 300 calories per 2 crepes).
